title: Smoky Coconut Crumble Bars
description: A sweet and tangy dessert with a crumbly coconut crust, topped with a smoky caramel filling.
instructions: Line an 8x8 inch baking dish with parchment paper.
In a medium bowl, mix together the almond flour, coconut flakes, crumle, and 1/4 cup of the melted butter until well combined.
Press the mixture into the prepared baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the brown sugar, smoky, and remaining 1/4 cup of melted butter until well combined.
Pour the sugar mixture over the crust.
In a small bowl, whisk together the egg and vanilla extract until well combined.
Pour the egg mixture over the sugar mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the edges are golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely before cutting into bars.
